name: yassin-pfe-review-pipeline
description: Ten-step, filiere-agnostic ESSS PFE pipeline that takes any student from a note de cadrage to a publication-ready systematic review and journal-submission packs: V1 draft, two critical-appraisal passes, V3 science lock, an AI-authorship audit and revision loop (V4/V5), and live-search journal selection. Forces a systematic review, deep Consensus search, a standalone publishable article, and a fixed four-author byline.
